pi_items.source: Explicitly required by the task description and checked in export_result.sh.
Counted exactly 8 unique real Wikimedia Commons image URLs downloaded in setup_task.sh.
Task description explicitly dictates that each of the 8 images must be placed on its own separate slide.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to build a presentation from exactly 8 real Mesoamerican architecture images downloaded from Wikimedia Commons during setup. Each image must be on its own slide (8 slides total). The resulting file must be saved to exactly /home/ga/Documents/presentations/architecture_lecture.pptx.
